title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization rather than subscriptions is the future for AI tools and applications. He contends that the primary bottleneck for AI adoption is human trust and adoption timelines, not technological limitations.
